title: ContentStructure
description: Universal document structure format produced by all Velo/Scribe parsers (EPUB, PDF native, Marker). Consumed by RSVP, Reader, and Scrub reading modes.

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters/sections in the document.

toc.description: Table of contents metadata for navigation UI.

hasStructure.description: True if chapter boundaries were detected (outline or TOC parsing). False if fallback page-based chunking was used.

images.description: Global image list with word positions for RSVP placement.

title.description: Chapter title as detected from outline, TOC, or heading analysis.

plainText.description: Full plain text of the chapter body. Paragraphs separated by double newlines. Footnotes may be appended after a ——— separator.

htmlContent.description: Rich HTML rendering of the chapter. Includes semantic headings, emphasis, lists, and footnote sections. Present when source provides structural markup (e.g., Marker, EPUB).

startPage.description: 1-based page number where this chapter begins in the source PDF.

startWordIndex.description: Global word index (across all chapters) where this chapter starts. Set by calculateWordBoundaries().

endWordIndex.description: Global word index where this chapter ends (exclusive).

wordCount.description: Number of words in this chapter (from tokenizer).

footnotes.description: Structured footnotes extracted from this chapter.

images.description: Images belonging to this chapter with local word positions.

isBackMatter.description: True if this chapter is back matter (bibliography, index, notes, appendix).

level.description: Heading level for nested TOC (1 = top-level chapter, 2 = section, etc.).

sourceType.description: Which parser produced this chapter's content.

dataURI.description: Base64 data URI (data:image/jpeg;base64,...) of the extracted image.

wordPosition.description: Word index at which this image should be displayed in RSVP mode.

Metadata.description: Optional metadata about the extraction source and process.
